topics.source_reference: Bing weekly 2026-05-01: page opportunity and query-page signals
topics.notes: The homepage shows weak CTR on broad brand queries and rising interest in guide-style queries. This is worth review because the home page may need better first-screen clarity and routing, but changes must stay narrowly focused.
topics.player_value: Improves the entry point for broad searchers looking for the site, guides, and navigation to major clusters.

claims_to_verify: The homepage is still the right canonical entry point for broad brand intent.
Any update can preserve navigation hierarchy and cluster separation.
The change will not duplicate content owned by other hubs or guides.
topics.next_step: Human review should decide whether the homepage can be tightened for clarity without becoming a duplicate guide or cluster hub.
